content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

CHG-1784 follow-up: Fix ONLY the syntax error at line 491 of scripts/db-ticket.sh. No DB work. No other edits.

The broken code block is lines 487-495 in scripts/db-ticket.sh:

      item_json=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq -n \
        --arg tkt_id "$tkt_id" \
        --arg seq "${new_seq:-}" \
        --arg effort "${new_effort:-}" \
        --arg agent "${new_agent:-}" \
        '{
          tkt: $tkt_id,
          seq: (if $seq != "" and $seq != "null" then ($seq | tonumber) else null end),
          effort: (if $effort != "" and $effort != "null" then $effort else null end),
          agent: (if $agent != "" and $agent != "null" then $agent else null end),
          committed_at: now
        }')

Replace exactly that block (preserving indentation) with:

      local jq_bin
      jq_bin=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null)
      if [[ -z "$jq_bin" ]]; then
        jq_bin="$(brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq"
      fi
      local item_json
      item_json=$("$jq_bin" -n \
        --arg tkt_id "$tkt_id" \
        --arg seq "${new_seq:-}" \
        --arg effort "${new_effort:-}" \
        --arg agent "${new_agent:-}" \
        '{
          tkt: $tkt_id,
          seq: (if $seq != "" and $seq != "null" then ($seq | tonumber) else null end),
          effort: (if $effort != "" and $effort != "null" then $effort else null end),
          agent: (if $agent != "" and $agent != "null" then $agent else null end),
          committed_at: now
        }')

After editing, run: bash -n scripts/db-ticket.sh
If it still fails, repeat with corrections until it passes.

Return ONLY: "db-ticket.sh syntax OK" or the remaining error. No other output.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.

edits.newText:
local jq_bin
      jq_bin=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null)
      if [[ -z "$jq_bin" ]]; then
        jq_bin="$(brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq"
      fi
      local item_json
      item_json=$("$jq_bin" -n \
        --arg tkt_id "$tkt_id" \
        --arg seq "${new_seq:-}" \
        --arg effort "${new_effort:-}" \
        --arg agent "${new_agent:-}" \
        '{
          tkt: $tkt_id,
          seq: (if $seq != "" and $seq != "null" then ($seq | tonumber) else null end),
          effort: (if $effort != "" and $effort != "null" then $effort else null end),
          agent: (if $agent != "" and $agent != "null" then $agent else null end),
          committed_at: now
        }')

        --arg agent "${new_agent:-}" \
        '{
          tkt: $tkt_id,
          seq: (if $seq != "" and $seq != "null" then ($seq | tonumber) else null end),
          effort: (if $effort != "" and $effort != "null" then $effort else null end),
          agent: (if $agent != "" and $agent != "null" then $agent else null end),
          committed_at: now
        }')

details.patch:
--- scripts/db-ticket.sh
+++ scripts/db-ticket.sh
@@ -476,9 +476,15 @@
       target_items=$(pg_query "SELECT items::text FROM $SPRINT_TABLE WHERE sprint_number=$new_sprint_num ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null)
       [[ -z "$target_items" || "$target_items" == "null" ]] && target_items='[]'
 
       local item_json
-      item_json=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq -n \
+      local jq_bin
+      jq_bin=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null)
+      if [[ -z "$jq_bin" ]]; then
+        jq_bin="$(brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq"
+      fi
+      local item_json
+      item_json=$("$jq_bin" -n \
         --arg tkt_id "$tkt_id" \
         --arg seq "${new_seq:-}" \
         --arg effort "${new_effort:-}" \
         --arg agent "${new_agent:-}" \

content.text:
scripts/db-ticket.sh: line 1309: syntax error near unexpected token `)'
scripts/db-ticket.sh: line 1309: `    fold_payload=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix 2>/dev/null)/bin/jq -n --arg child "$child_id" --arg parent "$parent_id" '{child: $child, parent: $parent}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{"child":"'"$child_id"'","parent":"'"$parent_id"'"}')'

(Command exited with code 2)
